chapter_title.ar: باب لُحُومِ الْجَلَّالَاتِ وَ بَيْضِهِنَّ وَ الشَّاةِ تَشْرَبُ الْخَمْرَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – Meats of the dung-eaters, and their eggs, and the sheep drinking the wine

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/45)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: مجهول - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/45)
text: سَأَلْتُ أَبَا الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام ) عَنْ بَيْضِ الْغُرَابِ فَقَالَ لَا تَأْكُلْهُ .

en.hubeali: Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Abdullah Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al hakam, from Abu Ismail who said,
‘I asked Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup> about an egg of the crow. So he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘Do not eat it’.
en.sarwar: 10. Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from ‘Abd Allah ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from abu ’Isma‘il who has said the following: “I once asked al-Rida’, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, about the eggs of crows. He (the Imam) said, ‘Do not eat them.’”
